evaluations.short_reason: No candidate evidence was matched to this condition.
missing_or_unclear_points: No asset statement(s) submitted to support funds to close and reserves.
evaluations.recommended_next_action: Request the most recent asset statement(s) covering at least $132,314.27 including reserves.
evaluations.label: CORR:  Assets:
evaluations.body: Provide most recent asset statement(s) to support sufficient funds to close and reserves. Require a total of $132,314.27 which includes $13,163.46 in reserves (which do not have to be liquid).  **The provide EVOD is acceptable but expires in 3 business days and prior to our closing.

evaluations.short_reason: Hazard dec page shows sufficient coverage and wind/hail, but the mortgagee clause is not listed.
satisfied_points: Dwelling coverage $410,000 supports the loan amount
missing_or_unclear_points: Loss payee / mortgagee clause (Lender's name, ISAOA, loan number) not shown on the page provided
evaluations.recommended_next_action: Request an updated declaration page reflecting the lender's mortgagee clause with the loan number.
evaluations.label: CORR:  Property: Insurance - Hazard
evaluations.body: **10/24 (BR) EFFECTIVE DATE MUST BE WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTE DATE AS THIS IS A PURCHASE** Provide evidence of hazard insurance with sufficient coverage to support lesser of the loan amount or replacement cost. Wind/Hail must be included, or a separate policy required. Loss payee to reflect: Lender's Name, ISAOA with loan number and endorsement(s).

evaluations.short_reason: Earnest money check and matching title receipt for $5,000 were both submitted.
satisfied_points: Copy of EMD check #1043 for $5,000 payable to ABC Title
Title company receipt acknowledging the same $5,000 deposit
evaluations.label: CORR:  Assets - Earnest Money Deposit
evaluations.body: *** (LA) 10/27 - Provide a copy of the check or title receipt.

evaluations.short_reason: A legible driver license copy was submitted for the borrower.
satisfied_points: State driver license, clear and fully legible
evaluations.label: CORR:  Credit: Primary Identification
evaluations.body: Provide a legible copy of Driver's License or other primary form of ID. Cut off...need better picture / copy of license

evaluations.short_reason: Operating agreement shows the borrower holds 50% membership interest, exceeding the 25% minimum.
satisfied_points: Operating agreement lists John Q Borrower at 50% membership interest
evaluations.label: Income:  NonQM -Verify minimum 25% ownership interest in the Business
evaluations.body: Income: Verify that the borrower is at least 25% owner of the business by providing one of the following: CPA letter, operating agreement, or equivalent reflecting the borrower's ownership percentage.
